channel.title: Python on David Whiteside
channel.description: Recent content in Python on David Whiteside

item.title: Claude Code Token Budget Plugin
item.description:
claude-code-tokenbudget was just released. There currently isn’t a good mechanism for preventing cost overruns with Claude Code if your using AWS Bedrock for example as a backend. I ran into a few accidental cost overruns, this plugin will help you prevent accidental cost overages.

Its easy to install, give it a try.

claude plugin marketplace add thedavidwhiteside/claude-code-tokenbudget
claude plugin install tokenbudget@claude-code-tokenbudget

item.title: Simple Tool to Create Throw-Away Python Virtual Environments
item.description:
Managing Python dependencies in isolated environments is a common practice in software development. But what if you need a quick, temporary virtual environment that you can discard after use? Here’s a simple tool and workflow to create throw-away Python virtual environments.

The Problem

While Python’s built-in venv or tools like virtualenv are excellent for managing environments, they require setup and cleanup. For quick experiments or isolated dependency installations, this process can feel cumbersome.
